reviews.comment:
Ubicado a la entrada de Dolores y pegado a la RN 2, como todo ACA es ideal para hacer un alto en el viaje y tomarse un cafe. Tiene un amplio parque alrededor, donde podes pasear a tu mascota.

(Translated by Google)
Located at the entrance to Dolores and right off National Route 2, like all ACA locations, it's ideal for a break during your trip and a coffee. It has a large park surrounding it, where you can walk your pet.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURicHZlUEVREAE

(Translated by Google)
Very good service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURieXJURmlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Fui ayer, había 4 autos adelante mio (1 en cada surtidor) y los playeros conversando de la vida con cada cliente. 25 minutos demoré desde que llegué hasta que me fui y no me ofrecieron servicio de limpieza de vidrio, agua o aceite.
El mismo tiempo que demoro a mi pueblo (distancia de 40km.) Tardé en llenar el tanque.
Ojalá mejoren!

(Translated by Google)
I went yesterday, there were four cars ahead of me (one at each pump), and the attendants were chatting with each customer. It took me 25 minutes from arrival to departure, and they didn't offer me windshield cleaning, water, or oil changes. It took me the same amount of time to get to my town (40 km) to fill up my tank. I hope they improve!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURiNHRlRGZBEAE
